In \`@artcommon/artcommonlib/git\_helper.py\` around lines 22 - 25, Call get\_github\_git\_auth\_env(remote\_url) before rewriting the remote URL and only rewrite to HTTPS when askpass credentials are provided; specifically, call get\_github\_git\_auth\_env(url=remote\_url) first, check if it returned a non-empty dict, and if so convert the remote with art\_util.ensure\_github\_https\_url(remote\_url) and then set\_env.update(git\_auth); if get\_github\_git\_auth\_env() returned an empty dict, leave remote\_url as the original SSH value and do not update set\_env.
